GLOSSARY AND ABBREVIATIONS 
 
 
MFC Monitoring and Forecasting Centre 
NWS North-West Shelf 
TAC Thematic Assembly Centre 
IOC Intergovernmental Oceanographic Commission of UNESCO 
NRT Near Real Time 
PUM Product User Manual 
QUID Quality Information Document  
CMEMS  Copernicus Marine Environment Monitoring Service  
NetCDF  Network Common Data Form  
CF  Climate Forecast (convention for NetCDF) 
MDS Marine Data Store 
FORECAST An assessment of the future state of the ocean variables made using numerical 
models. 
HINDCAST 
An assessment of the past state of the ocean variables made using numerical 
models with or without data assimilation. Simulations and analyses are 
hindcasts.  
SIMULATION  A hindcast done without data assimilation. 
ANALYSIS A hindcast adjusted with data assimilation 
SSS Sea Surface Salinity 
SSC Sea Surface Current 
SSH Sea Surface Height 
SST Sea Surface Temperature
